result.markdown: --- date: last-modified date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD" title: "28. Critical Values of the *t* Distribution" subtitle: "Reference Table and Reproducible Generator" reference-location: margin resources: - tables/make_t_critical_values_table.R - tables/t_critical_values_extended.csv - tables/t_critical_values_extended.tex - tables/t_critical_values_extended.pdf --- ::: {.cell} ::: This page reproduces the classic printed table of critical values for the *t* distribution, with degrees of freedom from $\\nu = 1$ to $\\nu = 1000$ and an additional asymptotic row for $\\nu = \\infty$. The continuation beyond 50 follows the same sampled degrees of freedom shown in the printed reference table: even values to 100, then progressively wider intervals through 1000. The two header rows give equivalent tail areas: - $\\alpha(2)$ for the two-sided test, - $\\alpha(1)$ for the one-sided test. The source files are available here: - [R script](tables/make_t_critical_values_table.R) - [CSV values](tables/t_critical_values_extended.csv) - [LaTeX source](tables/t_critical_values_extended.tex) - [PDF table](tables/t_critical_values_extended.pdf) The PDF below is produced by the R script and typeset in LaTeX. ```{=html} ```
